text: Shipped a 40% latency cut on our session store today. Turns out the bottleneck was a missing index. Classic.
Orbit CLI 2.0 is out. Faster cold starts and a brand new plugin system. Changelog in the thread.
Replaced our cron-based reaper with an event-driven cleanup. Memory graphs are finally flat.
Reminder that color contrast is not optional. WCAG AA is the floor not the ceiling.
Hot take: most observability dashboards measure activity not health. Track SLOs instead.
New guide up: migrating to the Orbit plugin API without downtime. Link below.
@maya_dev totally agree on the SLO point. We gated our last rollout on p95 and it caught a regression.
On-call week starting. Pray for my pager.
We are hiring two senior backend engineers. Remote friendly. Apply via the careers page.
Finally migrated our design tokens to a single source of truth. No more drift between Figma and code.
